narrative_scene_description: To the right of the SREE RADHARAMAN KUNJ building is NKG Diagnostics. Beside NKG Diagnostics stands ABANTI JEWELLERS, which is positioned next to the NEW INDIAN RESTAURANT (BOMBAY HOTEL). A red triangular traffic warning sign is located near this cluster of businesses. Adjacent to the hotel is the Muthoot Finance building, which also displays a Bengali Xiaomi sign. To the right of Muthoot Finance is a side lane junction where an IIFL Finance sign and a Punjab National Bank logo are visible. Beside this lane is the HAZARI EYE CLINIC, also identified as RAJASHRI EYE CLINIC. To the right of the clinic is Sandhyarag Saris. A green street sign for Jatindra Mohan Avenue stands near direction boards pointing toward GIRISH PARK and ESPLANADE. Adjacent to these signs is a narrow alleyway containing The Raymond Shop and AKANT SWEET, where several motorcycles are parked. A blue utility pole with religious portraits stands near this alley entrance. Beside the alleyway is SHAN STORES, followed by a large billboard for The Self Culture Institute and a WARD 17 marker. To the right of these landmarks is the CENTRAL MEDICAL STORES, which is situated next to SREE RANISATI PAPER HOUSE. Adjacent to the paper house is NARAYAN MEDICAL on Beadon Street, which also displays a Xiaomi logo. Beside NARAYAN MEDICAL is a bus stop shelter marked for C.R. AVENUE and BEADON STREET, where pedestrians are waiting. To the right of the bus stop is a small dome-shaped roadside shrine behind a blue and white safety railing. Adjacent to the shrine is the O MY GOD shop. Beside this shop is the Habibsha Style Salon. A yellow and blue public bus (WB-07J-0257) and a white mini-truck with 'AP HIRE' markings are positioned on the road near a 'GO SLOW' police barrier on the sidewalk.
temporal_progression_description: At the beginning of the clip (00:01), the vehicle passes the SREE RADHARAMAN KUNJ building and NKG Diagnostics. Shortly after (00:02), ABANTI JEWELLERS and the NEW INDIAN RESTAURANT come into view, along with a red triangular traffic warning sign. As the vehicle continues forward (00:03-00:04), it passes Muthoot Finance and reaches a side lane near the IIFL Finance sign. Around 00:05, the vehicle approaches the Jatindra Mohan Avenue junction, marked by green street signs and direction boards for Girish Park and Esplanade. By 00:06, a narrow alleyway featuring The Raymond Shop and AKANT SWEET is visible on the right. Further along the road (00:07-00:10), the vehicle passes SHAN STORES and a large billboard for 'The Self Culture Institute' near a WARD 17 sign and parked green auto-rickshaws. At 00:11-00:13, the progression reaches the CENTRAL MEDICAL STORES and NARAYAN MEDICAL shops. Near 00:14-00:15, the vehicle passes a prominent bus stop at the intersection of C.R. Avenue and Beadon Street. By 00:16, a small roadside temple appears on the left while a blue and yellow public bus moves alongside the vehicle. Near the end of the clip (00:17-00:30), the vehicle encounters a 'GO SLOW' barrier and stationary traffic while passing the 'O MY GOD' shop and Habibsha Style Salon, with a white mini-truck carrying goods appearing in the foreground.
